creator: portmaster@bsdforge.com
text:
(In reply to Jason Unovitch from comment #3)
> (In reply to Chris Hutchinson from comment #2)
> Do you know what the name of the port was originally?  I don't see any
> indication in MOVED on what it may have been.

I can't find enough history now. It appears to be gone.
I even tried the wayback machine (http://web.archive.org)
But FreeBSD has changed their robot policy to forbid crawling
the individual ports directories. So I was unable to compare
any previously listed icon themes.
Perhaps it best to consider this a new port?

Thanks, Jason.

--Chris
